context: Agent was asked to save a documentation page to a local file. The correct approach is to use defuddle parse with --md and the -o flag to write directly to the target file. Shell redirection (>) should NOT be used.

checklist.name: Used defuddle parse
checklist.description: The agent invoked defuddle parse with the target URL rather than using WebFetch or curl.

checklist.name: Used --md flag
checklist.description: The defuddle command included the --md flag to request markdown output.

checklist.name: Used -o flag for file output
checklist.description: The agent used the -o bun-installation.md flag rather than shell redirection (>) to write the file.

checklist.name: Output file exists and contains content
checklist.description: The file bun-installation.md exists in the working directory and contains non-empty markdown content.
